Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I spend my breaks doing nothing but reading, so I think it's about time I bought some new ones...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Oh, all of the books on this shelf are only 100 yen each! That means I can afford them with my allowance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}We can go now. I don't really see anything that interests me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}It is! I've been looking for this collector's edition for forever![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}This is a collection of illustrations from the shojo manga I read! It even has a set of new short stories inside![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I never thought I'd find this in a used bookstore. And in the novels section too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Maybe the shop owner saw the "short stories" label and made a mistake.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}...It's got all three volumes too. This is amazing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Each volume is 6,000 yen, so that means... 18,000 yen total!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 13 9 15 109}Of course! All three volumes are great![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}The characters are portrayed so realistically! It's like they really exist![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I can't afford it with what I have right now, and I don't want to go and take money out of my savings...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}My monthly allowance is 5,000 yen. So it's not enough, even if I save my lunch money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}But I'll get it, no matter what! I just need to wait until next month... or the month after... or...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}...I'll get them by the time I graduate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I-I need to hide this where no one will see it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Oh, please don't get bought by someone else...[n]{f 1 1}
